name: @forwardimpact/libharness
description: Autonomous agent team harness — coordinate a lead and participant agents in one async session, with eval, benchmark, and trace tooling to prove the changes worked.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Coordinating several agents in one session means hand-rolling message passing, turn-taking, and termination, and every orchestration script re-solves it.
jobs.bigHire: coordinate a lead and participant agents over async messages in one session.
jobs.littleHire: run a supervised pair, a facilitated meeting, or a multi-agent discussion without writing the message bus and turn loop.
jobs.competesWith: manual orchestration scripts; hand-rolled message passing and turn-taking; sequential single-agent calls; running one agent at a time

jobs.trigger: An eval passes locally but fails in CI and the only output is 'assertion failed.'
jobs.bigHire: prove whether agent changes improved outcomes with reproducible evidence.
jobs.littleHire: run an eval or benchmark and get a trace that shows exactly what the agent did.
jobs.competesWith: manual before/after comparison; trusting gut feeling over evidence; skipping evaluation entirely
